assertions.description: Frontmatter has required Agent Skills fields (name, description)
Teaches faithful content reproduction (the core capability fg-content-mapping evaluates)
Forbids inventing content the source does not have
assertions.text: Never invent content the source doesn't have

assertions.description: Treats repeating blocks (team members) as a complete list with every field
assertions.text: Repeating blocks: build the COMPLETE list, with every field of every item

assertions.description: Names team members as a canonical repeating-block example
Requires enumerating every block, not sampling (the count must be exact)
Requires extracting every field of each block (name, role, social links)
assertions.text: Extract every field of each block

assertions.description: Calls out the missing social-link failure mode (e.g. the LinkedIn link per card)
Forbids paraphrasing or borrowing a field from a sibling item
assertions.text: never paraphrased, never borrowed from a sibling

assertions.description: Defines an element inventory as the QA gate against missed elements
assertions.text: Element inventory (the QA gate against missed elements)

assertions.description: Requires extracting structurally from the DOM, not by eye
assertions.text: Extract from the DOM, structurally, not by eye

assertions.description: 'Never invent' rule appears before the element-inventory QA gate (capture before verify)
assertions.first: Never invent content the source doesn't have
assertions.second: Element inventory (the QA gate against missed elements)
